candidates.why: This appears to be the net cash flow from operating activities subtotal immediately before investing activities.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities INVESTMENT ACTIVITIES

variables.notes: Despite the concatenated section label, this is the reported net cash flow from operating activities subtotal and best matches OANCF.
